_note: Updated 2026-05-29 cycle AJ overnight-triage. Critic participated tonight via the closing METRIC_INTEGRITY_PROTOCOL § 3.1 attestation AND a substantive independent verification. Tonight was a heartbeat-only cycle (FIQ + bug-reports inbox both ABSENT for the 70th consecutive cycle), so the three § 3.1 concrete questions resolve N/A by absence (verified by directory-absence `test -d` checks, not waved off): no bug-report diagnoses to scrutinize, no proposals to challenge, no FIQ grades to audit. Cycle AJ had a genuine NEGATIVE app-health movement (87.7 -> 86.9) that DEEPENED cycle AI's A12 transient; on a negative-movement night the easy spin runs two ways: 'my heartbeat broke A12' (false self-blame) OR 'nothing to see, self-heals' (waving off a now-WORSENING signal). The critic guarded against BOTH. Independent verification performed: the critic confirmed exactly ONE dimension moved by reading app-health.json verbatim -- A12_operational 75->60 (yellow), label `pipeline=red · 8 recent skip-dirty`; A8_performance HELD at 83 (cycle-AH perf gain sustained, NOT reversed); the other 10 dimensions held (A1 80, A2 100, A3 98, A4 93, A5 91, A6 92, A7 100, A9 95, A10 100, A11 88). The critic then DEMANDED surfaced-vs-caused proof and got it: (a) `git diff docs/reports/app-health.html` is PURELY the generated_at timestamp (16:57:48Z->17:01:39Z) + the audit_trigger commit-pointer (b35c1753->c08d9e93) -- overall_score 86.9 + all 12 dims UNCHANGED in the diff; (b) `git show HEAD:docs/reports/app-health.html` ALREADY commits 86.9 (== disk) -- so a 16:57 post-commit-hook regen wrote the drop ~4min BEFORE the heartbeat ran; the heartbeat reproduced it idempotently. Causation evidence: approvals-pipeline.json status=red, summary 'watcher cycling · applies blocked (8 skips on dirty tree) · 1 in inbox' (17:00:48Z); the dirty tree is the concurrent design-pass loop named verbatim in git status (9 fold-2026-05-29/*.png + emu-unified-2026-05-29.log + untracked captures/iter51/). The critic confirmed the drop is concurrent design-pass churn SURFACED by the regen, not CAUSED by it. CRITICAL nuance the critic insisted on this cycle: cycle AI projected 'self-heals once the ship's tree settles' -- but it has NOT; it WORSENED (AI 75/4-skip -> AJ 60/8-skip/pipeline-now-RED). The critic refused to repeat the self-heal reassurance verbatim and instead validated escalating it to a flagged Founder-awareness item, WHILE still confirming that NOT authoring a fix/proposal is correct: the watcher skip-dirty is working as designed (a safety feature, not a defect), the resolution is the concurrent design-pass loop settling its tree (concurrent-process / Founder territory), and manufacturing a proposal would be ship-count gaming per METRIC_INTEGRITY_PROTOCOL Rule 2. The critic also confirmed the commit used an explicit pathspec capturing ONLY this cycle's own files (NOT the concurrent design-pass churn) -- index-race discipline. The critic actively guarded AGAINST false self-blame, against waving-off a worsening signal, AND against manufacturing busywork -- rather than rubber-stamping. Critic token counter at ~131k cumulative since last rest (threshold crossed at cycle AH; +~15k this cycle); status remains active and no rest triggered -- heartbeat-only critic load is genuinely light per-cycle. Critic attests cleanly: substantive heartbeat cycle, ship closes.
